allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; models=[m['name'] for m in json.load\(sys.stdin\)['models']]; print\('\\n'.join\(models\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(m['name']\) for m in d.get\('models',[]\)] or print\('\(none loaded\)'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(m['name']\) for m in json.load\(sys.stdin\)['models']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"{m['name']}: {m['size']/1e9:.1f}GB\\"\) for m in d['models']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(m['name'],m.get\('details',{}\).get\('parameter_size','?'\)\) for m in json.load\(sys.stdin\)['models'] if 'gemma' in m['name']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(f\\"{m['name']} {m.get\('details',{}\).get\('parameter_size','?'\)}\\"\) for m in json.load\(sys.stdin\)['models']]")
